key_finding: Instruction tuning creates ultra-fragile KV encoding: Qwen3-4B-Instruct (same architecture as Base) shows 90% baseline → 0-4% under ANY strategy at 1% norm-matched noise. NO dissociation, NO protection strategy works. Encoding is TRAINING-dependent, not just architecture-dependent.
evidence_impact: Major revision: three distinct encoding regimes (Base-concentrated, Instruct-distributed/Llama, Instruct-ultrafragile/Qwen). Training determines regime. Qwen-Base concentrated encoding does NOT survive instruction tuning.
next_planned: Lower noise scale test on Qwen3-4B-Instruct (0.1x, 0.01x norm) to check if spatial structure exists at smaller perturbation; OR Llama-Base encoding test to complete 2x2 comparison

spatial_structure.status: Qwen-Base only (PGD rho=0.78); NOT causally valid on Llama; UNTESTABLE on Qwen-Instruct at norm-matched noise

natural_usage.status: negative — H2O/AC orthogonal; TC best on Llama; all fail on Qwen-Instruct

cross_model_replication.status: Three distinct encoding regimes identified. Training > architecture for encoding type
